name: Sweet Drive
explanation: A warm asymmetric soft-clip overdrive. The signal is band-limited to clean the low end, then pushed into an asymmetric waveshaper that clips one half harder than the other — generating even harmonics for a sweeter, slightly fatter break-up over a gentle mid-hump. Touch-sensitive, amp-like dynamics; a post tone low-pass shapes brightness, with output Level and dry/wet Mix. Controls: Drive, Tone, Level, Mix.
